_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Treatment of human and murine NF2-deficient SCs with the FAK-specific kinase inhibitor defactinib...modestly impaired cell viability at doses above 1 μM...revealed significant growth suppression in response to 5 μM defactinib
details: Treatment of human and murine NF2-deficient SCs modestly impaired cell viability at doses above 1 μM; 5 μM caused significant growth suppression in colony-forming assays
